# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I found no new correctness issues introduced by this working-tree diff. The diff only updates `.ralph-burning` run/journal artifacts and AGENTS instructions; the requested scope-guidance implementation in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs` and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` is already present in-tree and covered by tests, so there is no additional immediate patch required from this review pass.

## Amendments

None.
